programme.title: Entertainment Tonight
programme.desc: News and features about performers, productions and the milieu.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: As a secret immunity deal threatens to let a man walk free, Parker fights to keep the case alive; when Parker's estranged sister suddenly appears -- and buried family wounds resurface -- the battle for justice becomes deeply personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Origins
programme.desc: With the Camp Pendleton office in danger of being shut down, the team confronts an uncertain future.

programme.title: NCIS: Sydney
programme.desc: The death of a former Marine wanted for murder leads the team to a sinister plot involving a disgraced journalist, one of Australia's richest men and lab-grown diamonds.

programme.desc: A man says his irate neighbor hit him with her vehicle; she says he jumped on her car and owes her for damages.

programme.sub-title: Grieving Siblings Demand Justice!; Repossession Romance Fail
programme.desc: Siblings accuse their late sister's neighbor of selling her belongings; a woman sues her ex for repayment of a loan, which he says was a gift.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: Castaways find themselves on both a literal and figurative island after their return from what is regarded as one of the "craziest tribals of all time"; castaways reflect on their letters from home; a shocking incident at an immunity challenge.

programme.desc: Phyllis is troubled by Nick's behavior; Matt Clark resurfaces in Genoa City; Cane makes a promise to Lily.

programme.desc: Hope encourages Brooke to fight for what she deserves at Forrester Creations; Carter warns Ridge and Steffy about the consequences of their actions.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Kat challenges Bill; Joey assigns Randy an urgent task; Vanessa has a business proposition for Hayley; Lia's threats chill Grayson; Jacob worries a dangerous trap has been set.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Single Mom ... Married Boyfriend!; Cheating on Facebook?
programme.desc: A single mother says she lent thousands of dollars to a man who says they were never intimate; a woman's cheating boyfriend accuses her of stealing his property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.sub-title: Twin Girls Repoed Ride!; Mangled Motorcycle Mix-Up!; Ex-Fiance Crash!
programme.desc: A man co-signs a loan for his grandchildren's father, and his favor is returned with nonpayment and a repo; a friend totals an imprisoned man's motorcycle and is seriously injured; a woman sues her ex-fiance for crashing her car and injuring her.

programme.sub-title: A Little Schmoozin' and a Nose for the News
programme.desc: Georgie's plan to get on the news sparks a feud between Mandy and a rival weather girl; Mandy tries to use the conflict to help her career.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When an emotion-driven decision puts Woodstone at risk, Sam and Jay step up to defend what they've built; Isaac struggles to adjust to new surroundings, only to realize that some connections are too important to leave behind.

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: When an ambitious filmmaker dies in a suspicious cleaning accident, Elsbeth focuses on the subject of her final documentary.
